case_title: TRIEN NGO VS. TROY NORTON JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED JAN-22-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TROY NORTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGO, TRIEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TROY NORTON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY NGO, TRIEN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TROY NORTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
